word: G3826 - παμπληθεί - pamplētheí - pam-play-thi' - All at once

sections.paragraph:
- Original: παμπληθεί

- Transliteration: Pamplethei

- Phonetic: pam-play-thi'

- Definition:

1. with the whole multitude

2. all together, one and all

- Origin: dative case (adverb) of a compound of G3956 and G4128

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Dative case (adverb) of a compound of G3956 and G4128; in full multitude that is concertedly or simultaneously: - all at once.
